provisions.title: Appropriation of amounts of money for the financial requirements of State
provisions.content: Subject to the State Finance Act, 1991 (Act No. 31 of 1991 ) the amounts of money shown in the Schedule are appropriated for the financial requirements of the State during the financial year ending 31 March 2022 as a charge to the State Revenue Fund.

provisions.title: Short title
provisions.content: This Act is called the Appropriation Act, 2021. Assented to Related documents Is amended by Appropriation Amendment Act, 2021 [] [] [] [] ▲ To the top > Contact us Visit our Facebook Page Visit our Twitter/X profile About NamibLII NamibLII is a project of the Law Reform and Development Commission managed by the Directorate: Law Reform of the Ministry of Justice of the Republic of Namibia. In terms of the Law Reform and Development Commission Act, 1991 (Act No. 29 of 1991), the Commission is mandated to consolidate or codify any branch of the law or to introduce other measures aimed at making the law more readily accessible. NamibLII is the embodiment of this mandate making annotated statutes, judgments, and gazettes available in a user-friendly format.
